name: Vessel Deck Container Placement - CR1
content: Containers may now be rotated by 90 degrees when placed on the deck. For each container, width and length can be swapped when determining occupied space.
value_info: `classes`: List[int], class index (1-based) of each container.
`separation`: 2D List[int], minimum pairwise class separation matrix.

var1.descr: `x`: List[int] of length n_containers, bottom-left x-coordinate for each container.

var2.descr: `y`: List[int] of length n_containers, bottom-left y-coordinate for each container.

var3.descr: `rot`: List[int] of length n_containers, where rot[i]=1 means container i is rotated by 90 degrees.

complexity.difficulty_rationale: Introduces rotation and effective-dimension helper variables, then rewrites both deck-boundary and pairwise separation logic to depend on orientation.

cr_impact.notes: Variable families: x, y, rot, eff_w, and eff_l. Constraint groups: rotation_dimension_linking, deck_boundary_with_rotation, and container_separation_with_rotation.
